source_posture: source-owned language registry for philosophy planting; language codes name review lanes and do not replace witness evidence

display_slots.role: attested, traditional, reconstructed, or normalized source-language form

display_slots.fallback: source label when the prepared source row is already Russian

display_slots.role: English review, runtime, and public interoperability language
display_slots.fallback: draft display label until reviewed translation is supplied

language_code_policy.primary_standard: BCP 47 where useful; ISO 639 language code plus ISO 15924 script tag when script distinction matters
language_code_policy.ancient_or_reconstructed_label_rule: use the stable scholarly language name when a strict code would hide uncertainty

source_ref_rule: Every non-null original title, translation, witness, edition, or language claim carries a ToS source_ref or a promoted external witness anchor.
